mapper.select: Select Top 1 ISNULL(IpAddress,'') AS IpAddress FROM XBOLTADM.TB_VISIT_LOG WHERE MemberID IN(Select memberID From XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER Where LoginID = #{loginID}) Order by SEQ DESC

Select Top 1 ISNULL(Comment,'') AS Comment, Time FROM XBOLTADM.TB_VISIT_LOG WHERE MemberID IN(Select memberID From XBOLTADM.TB_MEMBER Where LoginID = #{loginID}) And ActionType =#{actionType} Order by SEQ DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO XBOLTADM.TB_TRAN_API_LOG ( Contents, MemberID, CreationTime ) VALUES( #{contents}, #{memberID}, getDate())

INSERT INTO XBOLTAPI.EVENT_LOG ( ObjectID, ObjectType, ObjectTypeCode, Operation, Completed, ChangeSetID, CreationTime, LastUpdated ) VALUES( #{objectID}, #{objectType}, #{objectTypeCode}, #{operation}, #{completed}, #{changeSetID}, getDate(), getDate() )
